context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 79 verified Dashboard UX Simplification. Key changes: (1) NEW Home tab for Partner (data-testid=partner-home) with action cards, quick access tiles, greeting card; (2) NEW Home tab for Admin (data-testid=admin-home) with pending approvals cards, org snapshot, quick access; (3) Sidebar regrouping - Partner has Daily Work/Sales & Earnings/Tools groups, Admin has Sales & Finance/Cases & Users/Reports & Analytics/System/Planning Tools/Tools groups; (4) FunnelProgress component (data-testid=funnel-progress) shows 5-step progress in expanded PA cards; (5) AI model switched from GPT-5.2 to Claude Sonnet 4.5 (model='anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5').
